abstract: ABSTRACT In this article, we present a curated set of 40 questions on Artificial Intelligence (AI) to address its rapidly evolving role in Industrial/Organizational (I/O) Psychology, Human Resources (HR), and Organizational Behavior (OB) research and practice. We solicited questions from our professional networks and organized the responses into themes: what AI is, its technical components, emerging best practices for AI in research, guidance for reviewing AI‐based work, and using AI in reviewing. This is intended to be a sufficiently extensive, though not comprehensive, overview of AI and its use in our field.

affiliation: University of North Carolina at Charlotte
authors_full.name: Scott Tonidandel

ob.ai_reason: AI在I/O心理学和HR的应用综述
ob.tldr: 本研究汇编了40个关于AI在工业组织心理学、人力资源和组织行为领域的常见问题，涵盖AI定义、技术要素、研究最佳实践、审稿指导以及利用AI辅助审稿等主题，为该领域提供系统性参考。

title: Personnel Psychology's 40 Questions Series: Artificial Intelligence
title_zh: 《人事心理学》40问系列：人工智能
